items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
▪️LE 5 À 7▪️
The hot-to-trot shoulder bag YSL finally has!!️ When I first saw it, I thought the name was so special. Inspired by the niche film "Cléo from 5 to 7", it tells the story of the 5-7 PM gap between leaving work and getting home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, looking structured yet not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives off a unique aura that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Model: 657228
Size: 24.5x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
New Cloud-shaped underarm chain bag has arrived! It has a unique curved shape that fits the underarm curve perfectly, making it super comfortable to use! Made from soft, wrinkled original cowhide, it has a unique look and a high-quality texture! The bag is very light overall, adding no burden to use. Just pick it up and go! The overall design is retro and elegant, and the opening features a one-piece molded hardware hinge design for greater convenience in daily use!
Model: 681632
Size: 24x14x2cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
#Monogram Woc#
Latest Version_#Black Silver Buckle#
Monogram caviar leather envelope bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, upgraded to the highest version. 100% original cowhide paired with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal YSL logo adds a personal touch; flip-top design ensures security. Small bag with large capacity, featuring 10 card slots, two bill compartments, two central pockets, and one zippered interior pocket. Fits everything!
Model: 26801
Size: 22.5x14x4cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
▪️LE 5 À 7▪️
In-stock photo
This year's exploding shoulder bag is finally here from YSL!
When I first saw it, I thought the name was so special. The inspiration comes from the niche film "Cléo from 5 to 7", telling the story of the 5-7 PM between work and home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, looking stiff but not too sharp.
Paired with the brand's iconic logo and the new insert buckle design, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Size: 24.5x16x6cm
Model: 2024 Plain
